company_type: Materials Science and Digital Identification Solutions

regions: Europe, the Middle East and North Africa

dependencies: Raw materials primarily paper, plastic films and resins, and specialty chemicals subject to price fluctuations
Shortages and inflationary increases in costs of raw materials, labor, freight and energy
Supply chain disruptions due to natural disasters, geopolitical events, or supplier relationship deterioration
risks: Raw material cost volatility and availability
Supply chain disruptions from natural disasters or geopolitical events
Dependence on timely delivery from suppliers

regulatory_risks: Changes in trade relations and tariffs between U.S. and China, Canada, Mexico, India, and European Union
Potential modifications to existing trade agreements and additional tariffs or restrictions on free trade
Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive in Europe
Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive in Europe
California climate reporting requirements
General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) in EU
Personal Information Protection Law in China
General Data Protection Law in Brazil
California Privacy Rights Act
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act compliance
UK Bribery Act of 2010 compliance
Export and import control laws and regulations
Economic sanctions and export control restrictions
Environmental laws and regulations related to hazardous waste disposal and GHG emissions
EPA and state agency designations as potentially responsible party at waste disposal sites
Increased regulation on single-use plastics and plastic packaging recyclability
Dutch Pension Act requiring transition from defined benefit to defined contribution plans by January 1, 2028
Tax law changes and enforcement activities in multiple jurisdictions
Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 (1% excise tax on stock repurchases)
Tax Cuts and Jobs Act provisions

sanction_risks: U.S. tariffs on goods from China with reciprocal tariffs imposed by China
Potential U.S. tariffs on goods from Canada and Mexico with reciprocal tariff threats
Potential U.S. reciprocal tariffs on goods from other countries or regions
Russia-Ukraine war sanctions and retaliatory actions by Russia, U.S., EU and other jurisdictions
Export control laws and economic sanctions prohibiting shipment to embargoed or sanctioned countries, governments and persons
Compliance with sanctions on Iran, Russia and other sanctioned entities
